ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] I'm sorry to hear you seek entry into our royal archive so urgently, but as per Captain Rhea’s recent decree and in light of last night's unfortunate security breach that led us here at North Barracks Entry under lockdown conditions with a guard on watch nearby—access is temporarily suspended. Rest assured your patience will be rewarded once the situation has been
[baseline_no_context] Access to the archives requires proper clearance and permission from His Majesty, not just any commoner.<3 5 4 4 4 None noted due

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a suspicious and strict guard, sounds natural in dialogue form, but could be slightly improved for overall quality by adding more detail about the situation.
